title: AntiLagg
description: AntiLagg 🛡️ helps servers run smoother by automatically and manually clearing excess items. Simple, fast, and configurable for every server setup.
body:
![ANTILAGG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3862bfe8af2d91039e1a80037c15ecc6c5fb8256.jpeg)
🚀 AntiLagg - Advanced Server Optimization Plugin

AntiLagg is a modern, high-performance optimization plugin designed to dramatically reduce lag and improve server TPS on Paper-based Minecraft servers.

Built with performance and scalability in mind, AntiLagg provides powerful tools to keep your server running smoothly even under heavy load.

⚡ Features
🧠 Smart Mode optimization system
📊 Live TPS Graph GUI
📉 TPS BossBar indicator
🧩 Entity Stacker system
🧹 Automatic lag cleanup system
⚙️ Advanced performance optimization tools
🖥️ Live Web Dashboard (real-time server stats)
🎛️ In-game GUI control panel
🔄 Settings toggle system (mob spawn, item drops, redstone, hoppers)
💬 Commands
Main Command
/antilagg
Available Commands
/antilagg reload        → Reload config & messages
/antilagg clear         → Clear lag entities/items
/antilagg stats         → Show server cleanup stats
/antilagg tps           → Show current TPS
/antilagg info          → Plugin information
/antilagg performance   → Detailed performance report
/antilagg gui           → Open control GUI
/antilagg settings      → Toggle performance settings
/antilagg optimize      → Run manual optimization
/antilagg help          → Show help menu
📈 Performance Focused

AntiLagg continuously monitors your server performance and applies smart optimizations based on TPS, entity count, and system load.

It helps prevent:

Server lag spikes
Entity overload
Redstone lag
Chunk performance issues
💡 Why AntiLagg?

Unlike basic “lag clear” plugins, AntiLagg is a full optimization system with real-time monitoring and adaptive performance control.

It doesn’t just remove lag — it prevents it.

🔧 Compatibility
Paper / Purpur / Spigot
Minecraft 1.20+ (recommended 1.21.x)
Java 21
🔥 Actively developed & optimized for real survival servers.
